ocr_findings.location: page_443 OCR has a 「商用ソフトウェアとOSS」 comparison table (5 rows). Translated entity set only carries 1 term entity.
ocr_findings.jp_actual: OCR contains: 商用 vs OSS table (費用/改良/再配布/転売/著作権 columns).
ocr_findings.jp_expected: Either a table entity preserving the comparison, or accepted summary inside term definition.
ocr_findings.trace: ocr/page_443.md lines 13-19 show the table; translated/page_443.json contains only term entity p443::1.
ocr_findings.recommended_fix: Non-blocking: confirm policy for sub-section tables on summary/sidebar pages. If table is meant to be captured as table entity, classifier missed it. For R6 release this is consistent with prior R1-R7 behavior (textbook-style supporting tables sometimes dropped); not introducing FAIL.

translation_findings.jp: ソースコードが公開されていて、改良や再配布が自由に行えるソフトウェアである
translation_findings.zh: 是指源代码公开、可以自由改良和再分发的软件。
translation_findings.en: It is software whose source code is publicly available and can be freely modified and redistributed.
translation_findings.issue: ZH definition starts with '是指…' but the surface (subject) is already '开源软件（OSS）'. Acceptable but reads slightly headless; could be '指源代码公开…的软件'.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Optional polish. Faithfulness PASS; fluency MINOR.
